americas.title: Estate Manager - HNW estate
americas.blurb: One of the highest-paid estate roles currently listed in the US. Full operational ownership of a high-net-worth Miami estate and its household team.

americas.title: Property Manager - HNW estate
americas.blurb: Property and grounds leadership on a Palm Beach estate, working alongside the household team to keep every system running.

americas.title: House Manager / Butler - HNW family
americas.blurb: A hybrid role for someone equally at ease running the house and delivering formal service at the table.

americas.title: Head Butler - Prominent couple
americas.blurb: Lead front-of-house service for a prominent couple: guest experience, formal service and household standards, with a strong benefits package.

americas.title: Estate Manager - Oceanfront estate
americas.blurb: Run a 20,000 sq ft oceanfront property in South Florida with oversight across additional US residences. A published salary band, which is rare in this market.

americas.title: House Manager - Bilingual, multi-property
americas.blurb: Oversee a primary residence plus five additional condominiums for a private principal. Bilingual candidates preferred.

americas.title: House Manager - Private family estate
americas.blurb: Run a 12,000 sq ft estate across two acres for a busy family with four children aged 4 to 12: staff, schedules, vendors and household standards.

americas.title: Estate Manager - International family
americas.blurb: Lead the estate team for a high-net-worth family with international roots: staff, vendors, renovations, inventory and household systems. At least 5 years in UHNW homes.

americas.title: House Manager / Personal Assistant
americas.blurb: Run the primary residence and provide high-level personal support to two AI executives who recently welcomed their first child.

europe.title: Estate Manager - Private residence
europe.blurb: Run a UHNW private residence in central Paris on a non live-in basis.

europe.title: House Manager - Private household
europe.blurb: A well-paid house management role in Gibraltar with a clear salary band published up front, which is rare in this market.

europe.title: Chief of Staff - UHNW household
europe.blurb: The strategic right hand to the principals: staffing, estate management, family logistics and lifestyle across every property. A senior target role worth studying.

mideast.title: Executive & Office Assistant - Recruitment group
mideast.blurb: Support the founders and the international recruitment team in Business Bay: scheduling, correspondence, client and candidate coordination. A strong way into the private-service industry.

mideast.title: International Human Resources Manager - Family office group
mideast.blurb: Manage the employment lifecycle of household staff across the UAE, France, the UK and the US for an international staffing group.
